name: Olive-Stuffed Rabbit Meat
recipeIngredient: 3 large tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the bones from the rabbit meat, taking care not to pierce it.
2. Sprinkle the inside of the meat with rosemary, salt, and pepper.
3. Mix together chopped garlic and olives in a bowl.
4. Spread the stuffing down the center of each saddle of rabbit.
5. Roll up the meat tightly and neatly around the stuffing. Secure the rolls with thin kitchen string.
6. Heat olive oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
7. Briskly seal the rolls on all sides until golden brown.
8. Add tomatoes, chicken stock, and tomato juice to the pan, stirring well to mix.
9. Season with salt and pepper.
10. Cook on moderate heat for 20 minutes, checking the level of liquid frequently and stirring as needed.
11. After 20 minutes, remove the rolls from the pan and allow the sauce to reduce and thicken.
12. Slice the rolls and serve on top of the tomato sauce.
